name: Buttermilk Crescents
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE 1 CUP FLOUR, SUGAR, SALT, SODIUM BICARBONATE AND YEAST.
2. HEAT MILK, WATER AND BUTTER TO 130°F.
3. ADD THE DRY MIXTURE AND BEAT FOR 2 MINUTES AT MEDIUM SPEED.
4. ADD ANOTHER 1/2 CUP OF FLOUR AND BEAT AT HIGH SPEED FOR 2 MORE MINUTES.
5. ADD ENOUGH FLOUR TO FORM A SOFT DOUGH.
6. KNEAD UNTIL SMOOTH AND ELASTIC.
7. LET RISE IN A GREASED COVERED BOWL UNTIL DUBLED IN SIZE.
8. ROLL INTO 2 - 12 inch ROUNDS AND CUT INTO 12 PIECES.
9. ROLL EACH PIECE INTO A CRESCENT SHAPE AND PLACE ON A BAKING SHEET POINT DOWN.
10. LET RAISE UNTIL DUBLED.
11. BAKE AT 350°F FOR ABOUT 15 TO 20 MINUTES OR UNTIL GOLDEN IN COLOR.
